pages.text: Twelve spell slots. The mid-tier Botany progression spellbook, crafted by surrounding any standard ISS spellbook with Terrasteel ingots.

pages.title: Stats
pages.text: $(li)+200 Max Mana$(li)+15% Botany Spell Power$(li)+10% Nature Spell Power$(li)+0.10 Mana Efficiency$(br)Mana network capacity: 200,000.
